description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named test-p4c-debian that runs on every push to main, on pull requests to main, and on merge groups to main. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels any in-progress runs on non-main branches. It should have two jobs: test-ubuntu22 and test-ubuntu20, both of which check out the repository with submodules and fetch depth 0, use ccache, build with GCC using tools/ci-build.sh, and run tests with ctest. The test-ubuntu22 job runs on ubuntu-22.04 with a fixed CTEST_PARALLEL_LEVEL of 4. The test-ubuntu20 job runs on ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix strategy for unity build ON and OFF, and also runs tests conditionally based on the unity build.
